verdict: A high-volume sunscreen (6,700 reviews) offering broad-spectrum UVA/UVB with dry-touch formula suitable for daily facial use. Excellent value for photoprotection but not a treatment serum.

_research.name: Neutrogena Ultra Sheer Dry-Touch Sunscreen SPF 30
pros: Highest review volume for SPF product
_research.con: Sunscreen function only; lacks active treatment ingredients like niacinamide, vitamin C, or exfoliants.
